Variable.Name: Pre_BiPcs
Variable.Value: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script: Checking 640 version and 710 First Customer Shipment of SAP PCS installed by SAPSetup" strSapPcs640Key = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAPPCS" strSapPcs710FcsKey = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\{6B7E9CCA-5AFC-4936-9ADF-E450BE6EBE21}" If Not NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist( strSapPcs640Key ) And Not NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist( strSapPcs710FcsKey ) Then NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "Pre_BiPcs", "FULFILLED" End If
